name: TA-65 microvascular dysfunction registry is planned with no posted results
summary: A current TA-65 vascular-function registry is important to watch but does not change current evidence.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT05598359 as a not-yet-recruiting TA-65 microvascular dysfunction registry with estimated enrollment of 180 and no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Adults aged 18 to 80 years in aging-associated microvascular dysfunction context
time_horizon: Estimated start on 2027-01-01 and estimated completion on 2029-12-31
quantitative_note: Estimated enrollment was 180; primary outcome is nitric-oxide-mediated endothelium-dependent vasodilation.
caveats: Not-yet-recruiting status is not evidence of benefit.
The vascular-function endpoint could become relevant, but results would need source review before changing the outlook.
Current status only supports watchlist completeness.
